title: Superior Foil Pie Dishes 9 inch Round – Pack of 20 Foil Pie Cases with Lids – Durable Oven Freezer Safe Disposable Aluminum Foil Flan Dishes for Baking Storage Takeaway
features: Perfect Size for Pies: These 9-inch pie dish food containers with lids are the ideal size for baking classic pies, quiches, and tarts. Spacious tin foil pie dishes to fit hearty fillings and deep crusts for a professional result every time

Sturdy & Leak-Proof: Made from high-quality, durable aluminum, these Pie tin foil baking trays won't crumple or leak. The secure-fitting lids of disposable pie dishes prevent spills, making them perfect for transporting or storing your baked goods

Oven & Freezer Safe: Whether you're baking your favorite pie or storing leftovers, these pie dishes for the oven can go straight from the oven to the freezer without losing their shape. Great for meal prep, make-ahead pies, and storing leftovers

Convenient: No need to worry about cleanup! These disposable pie dishes foil food containers with lids offer hassle-free convenience, making them perfect for parties, holiday baking, or gifting homemade pies to friends and family

Versatile Kitchen Use: Not just for pies! Superior pack of 20 round foil trays are great for baking quiches, deep-dish pizzas, and even casseroles. Ideal round foil trays with lids for home bakers, catering, or takeaway businesses
